text: 주의 메커니즘은 국소적이며 한 번에 한 영역만 순차 처리
interpretation: 신규 진술은 주의를 국소·순차 처리로 규정하지만, 기존 지식 1(Transformer self-attention의 전역·병렬 가중)과 기존 지식 2(시상 게이팅을 통한 전역 의식 통합)는 주의가 분산·동시·통합적으로 작동함을 시사한다 — 즉 '국소/순차' 대 '전역/병렬'이라는 처리 위상의 충돌이다. 통합 가능성은 두 수준이 서로 다른 시간·공간 스케일에 존재한다고 보는 것이다.

text: 뇌의 reward learning 은 dopamine 신호로 시냅스를 강화
attention 은 모든 입력 쌍을 동시에 가중평균하는 전역 연산
interpretation: 새 진술은 attention을 '모든 쌍의 동시 전역 가중평균'으로 규정하지만, 기존 지식 1(Transformer self-attention)은 softmax 정규화로 sparse하게 편향된 가중치를, 기존 지식 3(PFC top-down)은 선택적·국소적 게이팅을 시사한다 — 즉 '전역 균등 연산'이라는 표현이 softmax 집중과 생물학적 selectivity 모두와 충돌한다.

text: self supervised learning 은 데이터의 구조에서 신호를 추출
interpretation: 갈등은 학습 신호의 출처에 있다. 뇌과학 측 기존 지식은 학습 신호를 외부 보상(dopamine) 또는 동시 발화(Hebbian co-activation) 같은 '관계적·외부적' 신호에서 찾는 반면, 새 진술의 self-supervised learning 은 신호를 데이터 자체의 내부 구조(예측 가능한 통계적 규칙성)에서 추출한다고 주장해 신호 원천이 외재적 vs 내재적으로 충돌한다.

autoregressive generation next token prediction

interpretation: 기존 지식은 SWR/replay를 수면 중 기억 공고화 메커니즘으로 규정하지만, 새 진술은 동일한 hippocampal replay가 깨어있을 때 발생하는 시뮬레이션이라고 주장한다 — 충돌은 '시점(수면 vs 각성)'과 '기능(과거 공고화 vs 미래 시뮬레이션)'의 이중 축에서 발생하며, 두 진술은 상호 배타가 아니라 동일 신경 메커니즘의 서로 다른 모드일 가능성이 높다.

synaptic pruning 미세아교세포가 약한 시냅스 제거
interpretation: The new statement emphasizes synaptic *elimination* by microglia, while the existing knowledge centers on synaptic *strengthening* (Hebbian potentiation, dopamine reinforcement, CA3 recurrent completion) — a polarity conflict between additive plasticity and subtractive pruning operating on the same substrate.

text: axonal myelination 으로 신호 전도 속도 증가
interpretation: The 'conflict' is actually a complementarity at different levels: myelination accelerates conduction along existing axons (a white-matter, speed-of-transmission mechanism), whereas the listed knowledge concerns synaptic-level plasticity (dopaminergic strengthening, microglial pruning, PFC top-down gating). The apparent tension arises only if one treats 'learning' as exclusively synaptic — myelination adds an axonal timing axis that the existing items do not cover.

blue green deployment zero downtime release
interpretation: 새 문장(blue-green 무중단 배포)과 기존 인프라 지식(CDN 캐시 무효화/TTL)은 동일한 '인프라' 도메인이지만 추상화 계층이 달라 충돌한다 — blue-green은 origin/애플리케이션 레이어의 트래픽 스위칭(라우터·로드밸런서 수준)인 반면, CDN purge/TTL은 edge 레이어의 캐시 일관성 메커니즘으로, 한쪽에서 무중단을 달성해도 다른 쪽이 stale 응답을 서빙하면 사용자 관점의 '진짜 무중단'은 깨진다.

text: neurogenesis 성체 해마 치상회 새 뉴런 생성
auto scaling group instance launch terminate
Q-learning agent state action reward maximization
interpretation: The new statement introduces reinforcement learning (Q-learning) — a paradigm centered on sequential decision-making and reward maximization — while the existing knowledge covers three self-supervised/generative paradigms (diffusion, autoregressive, contrastive) that learn from data distributions without explicit reward signals. The conflict is paradigmatic: RL optimizes a scalar reward via policy/value functions, whereas the others optimize likelihood or representation-similarity objectives, so they treat 'learning signal' fundamentally differently.

text: market making algorithm bid ask spread profit
interpretation: The new English statement 'market making algorithm bid ask spread profit' substantively overlaps with existing item #1 (Korean: 시장조성자 bid-ask spread 유동성 공급) on the same mechanism, but reframes its purpose from 'liquidity provision' (a market-structural service) to 'profit extraction' (a private objective) — the conflict is normative/teleological rather than factual, and is sharpened by item #3 which shows the same actors can shift from spread-capture to latency arbitrage.

text: multi armed bandit exploration exploitation
interpretation: The new AI statement on multi-armed bandit exploration/exploitation conflicts with existing knowledge that frames decision-making either as model-based latent rollout planning (world models) or as deterministic resource allocation (k8s scheduler, service mesh routing) — bandits are model-free online learners with regret bounds, whereas world-model planning assumes a learned transition model and infra schedulers assume known costs, so the conflict is over whether action selection should be uncertainty-driven sampling, model-based simulation, or policy-fixed allocation.

text: statistical arbitrage pair trading mean reversion
interpretation: Statistical arbitrage pair trading exploits *temporary divergence* and bets on mean reversion (taking liquidity on mispricing), whereas market making algorithms exploit the *bid-ask spread* by continuously providing liquidity — the two금융 strategies operate on opposite sides of the order book and assume different price dynamics (reversion vs. micro-noise around fair value), so co-existing in one knowledge base creates a directional conflict about how 'edge' is captured.

text: PPO policy gradient clip ratio update
portfolio optimization Markowitz mean variance
interpretation: The new statement on Markowitz mean-variance portfolio optimization sits in the same 금융 domain as 'implied volatility' but treats volatility as a static covariance input (historical, realized), whereas implied volatility is a forward-looking, market-priced quantity — the conflict is a representational mismatch in how 'variance' enters the model (backward-looking sample moment vs. risk-neutral expectation).

text: idempotent operation retry deduplication
trade reconciliation matching settlement break
interpretation: The new statement focuses on post-trade exception handling (reconciliation breaks during settlement matching), which sits in tension with existing knowledge #3 that frames settlement as a deterministic T+2 clearing-house pipeline and knowledge #1 that assumes idempotent retries can absorb mismatches — i.e., the new statement exposes that real settlement is not a clean idempotent flow but a stateful matching process where breaks require human-or-rule-based resolution rather than retry.

text: rate limiting token bucket leaky bucket
liquidity provider market depth slippage
interpretation: The new statement frames liquidity provision as a continuous, depth-based mechanism that absorbs order flow smoothly via slippage, whereas the existing 금융 knowledge emphasizes discontinuous market controls (circuit breakers, price limit halts) and adversarial latency exploitation (HFT 지연 차익거래) — a tension between gradual price-formation through depth and abrupt regulatory/structural interruptions. The conflict is methodological: smooth liquidity curves assume continuous trading, while halts and latency arbitrage assume the book can be frozen, jumped, or stale-priced.

text: dopamine reward prediction error temporal difference
loss aversion 행동경제학 prospect theory
amygdala fear learning conditioning
interpretation: The new statement on amygdala fear conditioning describes aversive (negative-valence) associative learning driven by prediction of punishment, which conflicts with item 1's framing of dopamine-mediated reward prediction error as the canonical TD-learning signal in the brain — both claim to be *the* neural substrate of associative value learning but operate on opposite valence channels and through distinct circuits (basolateral amygdala vs VTA→striatum).

text: market panic flash crash herding behavior
interpretation: The new statement frames market crashes as emergent herding/panic dynamics (a behavioral, contagion-driven phenomenon), which conflicts with the existing knowledge that models crash risk through stochastic tail-event simulation (Monte Carlo VaR — assumes independent or weakly correlated draws) and treats circuit breakers as the institutional safeguard (a rule-based exogenous halt). The conflict is one of mechanism: behavioral contagion vs. statistical tail sampling vs. rule-based intervention — each captures only one facet of the same crash episode.
